case_title: PARKER, WESLEY VS AC AUTO CLINIC

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AC AUTO CLINIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT AC AUTO CLINIC DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE COMPROMISE MEDIATED BY THE BUREAU OF AUTOMOTIVE REPAIR CONSTITUTES A FULL AND FINAL SETTLEMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
